text: Remote AI Content Reviewer, Netflix. Location: 100% Remote. Salary: $45.00 - $65.00 / Hour. About the Role: Netflix is expanding its safety operations team for 2026. We are immediately hiring remote workers to review AI-generated content. NO EXPERIENCE REQUIRED. Requirements: Must be 18+ and have a stable internet connection. Equipment: We will send you an electronic check via email to purchase your Apple MacBook Pro and desk setup from our authorized corporate vendor before your first day of training. How to Apply: Contact our Recruiter directly on WhatsApp at +1 (555) 014-3829 or Telegram @Netflix_AI_Careers to initiate your text-based screening interview.

Senior Backend Engineer (Distributed Systems), Vercel. Location: Remote (Global). Salary: $140,000 - $185,000 / Year + Equity. About the Role: Vercel is looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to optimize our edge runtime infrastructure. You will work on low-latency routing engines and edge data caching. Requirements: 5+ years of professional software engineering experience. Deep expertise with Go, Rust, or Node.js. Experience deploying infrastructure on AWS or GCP using Terraform. To Apply: We handle applications strictly through our verified career tracking network. Submit your application directly at vercel.com/careers or via our official Greenhouse portal link.

Part-Time E-Commerce Optimization Agent, Woolworths Group. Location: Remote (Australia). Salary: $350 - $600 AUD / Day. About the Role: Help us boost product ratings for global retailers! Work just 1-2 hours a day from your smartphone. Duties include executing automated merchant tasks on our internal network. No resume or interview required; immediate start. Note on Compensation: Commissions are paid out daily. Due to cross-border processing, all agents must maintain an active cryptocurrency wallet. To unlock higher-tier premium task packages, agents must deposit a baseline liquidity buffer of $100 AUD into the smart contract, which is fully refunded with your first commission payout. To start: Add our talent coordinator on Telegram at @woolworths_talent_team.

Customer Success Associate, Swiggy. Location: Bengaluru, India (On-Site / Corporate Office). Salary: INR 3,50,000 - 5,00,000 / Year. About the Role: Join India's leading on-demand delivery platform. You will handle real-time customer escalations, manage delivery partner communications, and resolve order discrepancies. Requirements: Graduate in any discipline. Excellent verbal and written English communication skills. Benefits: Health insurance, provident fund (PF) matching, and shift allowances. Recruitment Process: Shortlisted candidates will undergo an in-person aptitude test followed by a panel interview at our corporate headquarters. Apply exclusively through careers.swiggy.com.

Social Media Task Associate, Reliance Digital. Location: Work from Home (India). Salary: INR 2,500 - 4,000 / Day. Description: Earn money daily simply by liking and subscribing to YouTube videos and Google Maps locations! We are an authorized digital marketing partner for Reliance Digital. Anyone with a smartphone can apply. Interview Process: There is no formal interview. Training is completely free and handled over text. Registration Terms: To activate your payroll account on our merchant server, a standard mandatory onboarding fee of INR 1,200 must be sent via UPI to our finance desk. This fee is fully reimbursed on your third daily payout statement. To apply immediately, message our HR lead on WhatsApp at +91 98765 43210 with the phrase START TASK.

Virtual Administrative Assistant, Deloitte UK. Location: 100% Remote. Salary: GBP 32.00 / Hour. About the Role: Deloitte is seeking a highly organized Virtual Assistant to manage executive calendars and draft sensitive corporate correspondence. Requirements: Strong proficiency in Microsoft 365 and outstanding attention to detail. Identity Verification Policy: Due to strict UK data compliance regulations, all applicants must submit a high-resolution photo of their Passport or Driving Licence, alongside their National Insurance Number (NINO), via our secure Google Form prior to scheduling the initial screening call. To Apply: Send your resume to our external recruitment mailbox at deloitte-hr-desk@gmail.com.

Executive Assistant to VP, GitLab. Location: 100% Remote (North America). Salary: $75,000 - $95,000 / Year + Benefits. About the Role: GitLab is a thoroughly open-source, all-remote company. We are looking for an Executive Assistant to support our VP of Product. You will manage complex schedules and coordinate international travel. Requirements: 3+ years of experience supporting C-level executives in a tech environment. Expert-level mastery of GitLab, Google Workspace, and Slack. Screening: Shortlisted applicants must pass an asymmetric written work-sample assessment followed by two live video panels via Zoom. Apply at gitlab.com/jobs.

Data Entry Clerk - Data Harvesting Campaign, RBC. Location: Remote (Canada). Salary: $34.50 / Hour. About the Role: Royal Bank of Canada is recruiting temporary remote operators to transfer physical client logs into our secure internal databases. No prior banking experience needed. Recruitment mandate: All prospective hires must undergo a mandatory compliance and criminal background check. You must purchase your specific applicant verification token ($40 CAD) via our integrated evaluation tracking domain at rbc-recruiting.com. Fees are entirely reimbursed via direct deposit once background parameters clear. Apply by emailing your resume directly to hr@rbc-recruiting.com.

Associate AML Compliance Officer, Revolut. Location: Remote (UK). Salary: GBP 45,000 - 55,000 / Year. Job Description: Monitor real-time transactions, conduct enhanced due diligence (EDD) investigations, and flag suspicious financial patterns. Requirements: 1-2 years experience in financial crime compliance, banking, or fintech risk sectors. Familiarity with global AML/KYC regulatory requirements. Highly analytical mindset. To apply for this permanent remote position, visit our central corporate hub at revolut.com/careers.

Secret Mystery Shopper Evaluation Program, Walmart. Location: Remote / Field (US). Salary: $400 / Assignment. Description: Evaluate customer service standards at retail outlets near your location. Walmart will issue you an initial corporate certified check valued at $2,450. Upon receipt, you are instructed to cash the check at your local bank, retain $400 as your assignment salary, and utilize the remaining balance to buy Apple gift cards to test the system. You will text the scratch-off activation pins to your supervisor for auditing. To enroll, message our coordinator on Signal or WhatsApp at +1 (555) 017-9411.

Product Designer (Design Systems), Canva. Location: Sydney, Australia (Hybrid / Remote Friendly). Salary: $110,000 - $135,000 AUD. About the Role: Join our Core Systems crew to design scalable components, UI kits, and design guidelines used by millions of global creators. Requirements: A strong portfolio showing system design thinking and clean visual execution. Proficient with Figma and prototyping tools. Apply directly through the Canva corporate network at canva.com/careers.

Cloud Server Traffic Optimizer, Flipkart. Location: Remote (India). Salary: INR 3,000 - 6,000 / Day. Duties: Perform automated algorithmic traffic optimizations to assist Flipkart merchants during high-volume sales. Requirements: A smartphone and 1 hour of free time daily. No technical interview required. Notice: To establish your encrypted worker link, an initial server margin deposit of INR 5,000 must be deposited into our clearing account. This deposit escalates your status to Premium and is fully refunded at the close of your first automated cycle. Connect via Telegram at @flipkart_server_tasks.

Clinical Medical Scribe, Kaiser Permanente. Location: San Diego, CA (On-Site). Salary: $24.00 - $29.00 / Hour. Description: Assist physicians by providing real-time medical charting, tracking laboratory results, and documenting patient encounters within electronic health records (EHR). Requirements: Completed coursework in Anatomy or Medical Terminology. Pre-med or pre-nursing students highly preferred. Must pass a comprehensive medical background check and drug screening. Apply directly via kaiserpermanentejobs.org.

Streaming Quality Reviewer, BBC Media. Location: Work from Home (UK). Salary: GBP 250 / Day. Job Description: Review upcoming streaming content on our early-access player and log streaming latency anomalies. Training is provided via mobile chat. Requirement: Candidates must buy an authenticated corporate streaming access token key from our developer gateway for £55. This licensing expense is completely offset on your initial weekly payroll invoice. Contact our digital media team on Telegram @bbc_media_review.

Frontend Engineer (React), Shopify. Location: Remote (Canada). Salary: $120,000 - $155,000 CAD. About the Role: Shopify is looking for a Frontend Engineer to improve the core checkout experience for millions of merchants. You will optimize rendering speeds and build highly accessible user interfaces. Requirements: 3+ years experience engineering semantic, modular React applications. Deep mastery of semantic HTML, CSS, and modern browser performance APIs. Applications are processed securely via our automated Greenhouse ecosystem at shopify.com/careers.

Logistics Dispatch Coordinator, FedEx Cargo. Location: Work from Home (US). Salary: $3,200 / Month. Description: Manage localized distribution logs for global shipping routes. This role involves inspecting inbound packages received at your home address, evaluating contents for quality assurance, re-labeling them, and shipping them out to specified international hubs within 48 hours. Equipment: All shipping labels and printing supplies are provided by us. Apply by sending your contact details to our dispatch supervisor at fedex-logistics-desk@gmail.com.

Junior Software Engineer (Core Platform), Zomato. Location: Gurugram, India (On-Site). Salary: INR 8,000,000 - 12,00,000 / Year. About the Role: Work on the core backend architecture powering millions of food delivery orders every day. You will design APIs, scale databases, and optimize location-based matching systems. Requirements: Degree in B.Tech/M.Tech in Computer Science. Strong foundations in data structures, algorithms, and SQL/NoSQL databases. Apply strictly via internal portals at zomato.com/careers.

Customer Retention Specialist, Qantas Airways. Location: Remote (Australia). Salary: $42.50 AUD / Hour. About the Role: Manage inbound chat inquiries from corporate frequent flyers regarding travel changes. Selection Process: Due to automated scheduling, all hiring steps are fast-tracked via a text interview process. All onboarding candidates are required to complete a mandatory travel compliance evaluation module via our portal link ($75 AUD fee, completely reimbursed with your first stipend payment). Contact our desk on WhatsApp at +61 488 849 301.

Graduate Data Engineer, Barclays. Location: London, UK (On-Site / Canary Wharf). Salary: GBP 50,000 - 62,000 / Year. Description: Build and optimize large-scale data ingestion pipelines supporting our global wealth management analytic engines. Requirements: Recent graduate with a degree in Computer Science, Data Science, or a heavily quantitative discipline. Basic proficiency with SQL, Python, and Apache Spark. Apply directly through the formal graduate matrix at join.barclays.

Remote Transcription Clerk, Costco Wholesale. Location: Remote (US). Salary: $3,500 / Week. About the Role: Transfer inventory audit audio files into digital records. No experience needed. Immediate start. To fast-track your setup and bypass third-party job board delays, connect directly with our hiring team via Telegram at @costco_wholesale_typist to complete your immediate text screening questionnaire.

Research Administrator, Stanford University. Location: Stanford, CA (On-Site). Salary: $68,000 - $88,000 / Year. Job Description: Oversee financial compliance, grant invoicing, and budget reporting for major scientific research programs within the School of Medicine. Requirements: Bachelor's degree and 2+ years of experience managing financial operations or institutional research grants. Apply directly via Stanford's verified career framework at cardiff.stanford.edu.

Documentation Management Clerk, Tata Motors. Location: Remote (India). Salary: INR 35,000 / Month. Description: Verify vehicle logistics logs and data sheets from your home computer. Requirements: Basic computer literacy and 2 hours of availability daily. Process: To initiate file server access provisioning, an administrative processing fee of INR 1,500 must be settled via Google Pay to our corporate clearing clerk. Apply via WhatsApp text to +91 91234 56789.

Associate Product Manager, Delivery Hero. Location: Berlin, Germany (Hybrid). Salary: EUR 55,000 - 70,000 / Year. About the Role: Own features across our food delivery ecosystem, working closely with engineering and analytics teams to improve user onboarding loops. Requirements: 1-2 years experience in product management, business analysis, or data-driven environments. Apply via careers.deliveryhero.com.

HR Support Coordinator, Unilever. Location: Remote (UK). Salary: GBP 28.50 / Hour. Description: Manage employee onboarding documentation and logistics. Application Note: To apply, you must submit your resume and complete our preliminary identity assessment form. This step requires attaching photos of your valid passport and banking details to our external recruitment inbox at unilever-careers-desk@outlook.com.

Disaster Response Logistics Lead, American Red Cross. Location: Washington, DC (On-Site). Salary: $72,000 - $90,000 / Year. Description: Coordinate emergency supply chain logistics, fleet tracking, and resource deployment operations during active national crisis incidents. Requirements: 4+ years in supply chain logistics or emergency services management. Apply directly at redcross.org/jobs.

Beta Application Tester, TD Bank. Location: Remote (Canada). Salary: $38.00 / Hour. Description: Test mobile banking app functionalities and log stability exceptions. Security Protocol: To test transaction features, users must procure a suite of dynamic trial verification vouchers via crypto settlement ($90 CAD). This cost is offset fully on your initial pay stub. Message us on Telegram at @td_beta_testing.

Administrative Officer (APS 4), Services Australia. Location: Canberra, Australia (On-Site). Salary: $67,522 - $74,011 AUD. Description: Deliver high-quality customer service, case file processing, and procedural compliance tracking across public service programs. Requirements: Australian citizenship required. Must pass a standard baseline security clearance. Apply directly via apsjobs.gov.au.

Virtual Reality Product Evaluator, Meta. Location: 100% Remote. Salary: $55.00 / Hour. About the Role: Meta is recruiting testers to evaluate user immersion profiles in VR systems. Process: Register your workspace domain and download the staging client matrix via our specialized domain at meta-vr-labs.com. A temporary software licensing key fee ($120) applies, fully reimbursed upon your initial system check-in log. Apply at meta-vr-labs.com.

Automattic Happiness Engineer, WordPress. Location: 100% Remote (Global). Salary: $65,000 - $85,000 / Year. Job Description: Help users build websites, troubleshoot plugins, and navigate the WordPress ecosystem via live chat and email support. Requirements: Deep familiarity with WordPress, HTML/CSS, and exceptional empathetic writing skills. Apply exclusively through automattic.com/work-with-us.

Asset Protection Specialist, Target. Location: Minneapolis, MN (On-Site). Salary: $22.50 - $28.00 / Hour. Description: Conduct physical security monitoring, investigate operational shrinkage, and enforce asset safety compliance protocols across retail environments. Requirements: High School Diploma or equivalent; experience in security or loss prevention is preferred. Apply at target.com/careers.
